body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #969

Adds a function that quantitatively checks how many NaNs are present in the state, and displays this information to the user. This can be used to inspect `sol.u[end]` after a simulation has run, to see if any NaNs were produced at the end of the simulation.

If no NaNs are found, this information is logged in an `info` statement. If NaNs are found, this information is logged in a `warn` statement.

## To-do
- [x] add function to recursively check NaNs in state
- [x] add tests
- [x] add optional mask argument
- [x] add monthly callback to longruns
title: add state NaN checker

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
It would be helpful to see soilco2.C throughout our longrun simulations to seen when/where it's NaN, especially since our other prognostic variables don't depend on it directly. This PR updates the "essential" diagnostics specified by the `output_vars = :short` flag for the SoilCanopyModel and LandModel to include soilco2.C.
title: add soilco2.C to :short diagnostics
